games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: Which word begins with /s/?
rounds.explanation: The correct answer is sun.

rounds.prompt: Blend c-a-t.
rounds.explanation: The correct answer is cat.

rounds.prompt: Blend s-u-n.
rounds.explanation: The correct answer is sun.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: Which is the uppercase partner for a?
rounds.explanation: The correct answer is A.

rounds.prompt: Which is the lowercase partner for M?
rounds.explanation: The correct answer is m.

rounds.prompt: Which word begins with /b/?
rounds.explanation: The correct answer is ball.
